recommendations.title: Possession
recommendations.overview: A woman's life is thrown into chaos after a freak car accident sends her husband and brother-in-law into comas. Thrills arrive after the brother-in-law wakes up, thinking he's his brother.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Thread
recommendations.overview: The teenage son of two fathers makes a documentary film about his parents but is surprised when a real-life plot twist occurs in his family.

recommendations.title: The Hunters
recommendations.overview: A policeman from Stockholm come to Norrbotten in Sweden, to join his brother, now when their father is dead. While there he starts to work on a long-running case where reindeers have been poached and soon discovers that his brother is involved...

recommendations.title: I Love You, Stupid
recommendations.overview: Marcos' life turns upside down after he loses the same day his girlfriend and his job. Marcos' life turns wild after to meet Raquel.

recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: Dolores Claiborne

recommendations.title: High Crimes
recommendations.overview: A female attorney learns that her husband is really a marine officer who has been AWOL for fifteen years and accused of murdering fifteen civilians in El Salvador. Believing her husband when he tells her that he's being framed as part of a U.S. Milit

recommendations.title: Battle in Heaven

recommendations.title: The Glass Key
recommendations.overview: A crooked politician finds himself being accused of murder by a gangster from whom he refused help during a re-election campaign.
